user.title: Add departure board
user.description: Search for a station by name and configure how many departures you want exposed.

data.slot_count: Number of departure slots to expose

data_description.station: Type part of the station name — e.g. 'Clapham' — and pick from the matches on the next step.
data_description.detailed: Enables internal times and STP indicators. Requires allowDetailed on your token.

pick_station.title: Pick a station
pick_station.description: {station_count} stations matched. Pick the exact one you want.

error.account_not_ready: The account is still loading. Wait a moment and retry.
error.station_required: Enter a station name or code.
error.no_station_matches: No stations matched. Try a different fragment.
error.station_invalid: Pick a station from the list.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach Realtime Trains to search stations. Retry shortly.

user.title: Add service tracker
user.description: Follow a single train by headcode and date (or full unique identity).

data_description.unique_identity: Full `namespace:identity:date` form, e.g. `gb-nr:1L40:2026-06-18`. Takes priority over headcode+date.
data_description.date: Departure date from the train's planned origin.

error.account_not_ready: The account is still loading. Wait a moment and retry.
error.headcode_required: Either headcode+date or unique identity is required.
error.service_not_found: No service found with the given headcode/date (or unique identity).

user.title: Realtime Trains
user.description: Enter your Realtime Trains next-generation API token. Sign up at https://api-portal.rtt.io if you don't already have one.

data.default_slot_count: Default number of departures per board

data_description.token: A long-life access token or a refresh token. Both are detected and handled automatically.

reconfigure.title: Replace token
reconfigure.description: Paste a new Realtime Trains API token to replace the one configured under {reconfigure_title}. Your monitored boards and service trackers will be preserved.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Realtime Trains
reauth_confirm.description: The token for {reauth_title} is no longer valid. Enter a new Realtime Trains API token.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to data.rtt.io. Check your network and retry.
error.invalid_auth: The token was rejected by Realtime Trains. Make sure you're using a next-generation API token from api-portal.rtt.io.
error.rate_limited: Your API token is rate-limited. Wait a few minutes and retry.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant log for details.
